ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT AS TO PLAINTIFF MONTE SMITH WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL, TRANSGENDER PRIDE CELEBRATION COMMITTEE, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PLAINTIFF MONTE SMITH AND OFF CALENDAR AS TO PLAINTIFF MAHLIK SMITH. MONTE SMITH DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION AND APPARENTLY CONCEDES THAT HE CANNOT STATE ANY VIABLE CLAIMS SINCE HE IS NOT A PLAINTIFF IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED ON JULY 8, 2016. PLAINTIFF MAHLIK SMITH'S FILING OF A FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ON JULY 8, 2016 MOOTS THE MOTION AS TO HIM. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: REYES F. HUNTER, CSR #6576, BUS. TEL: 530-339-5023. (D302)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2016 Set For Trial On Oct-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2016 Set For Trial On Jul-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Joshua Herr of Rosenfeld Meyer & Susman (310-858-7700) appears telephonically for plaintiff/non-opposing party, Mahlik Smith

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL, TRANSGENDER PRIDE CELEBRATION COMMITTEE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to plaintiff Monte Smith and off calendar as to plaintiff Mahlik Smith. Monte Smith does not oppose the demurrer and apparently concedes that he cannot state any viable claims since he is not a plaintiff in the first amended complaint filed on July 8, 2016, so the demurrer is sustained as to him as to both claims. Plaintiff Mahlik Smith's filing of a first amended complaint on July 8, 2016 moots the demurrer as to him. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Joshua Herr of Rosenfeld Meyer & Susman (310-858-7700) appears telephonically for plaintiff/non-opposing party, Mahlik Smith

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO LESBIAN, GAY, BISEXUAL, TRANSGENDER PRIDE CELEBRATION COMMITTEE, INC.'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is GRANTED without leave to amend as to plaintiff Monte Smith and off calendar as to plaintiff Mahlik Smith. Monte Smith does not oppose the motion and apparently concedes that he cannot state any viable claims since he is not a plaintiff in the first amended complaint filed on July 8, 2016. Plaintiff Mahlik Smith's filing of a first amended complaint on July 8, 2016 moots the motion as to him. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, Bus. Tel: 530-339-5023. (D302)
